lighting_spec.name: Hub_Clearing_Cretaceous_Midday

target_area.description: Hero screenshot composition — PlayerStart clearing with ruin cluster

lighting_spec.lighting_intent: Bright Cretaceous midday — living jungle, warm golden canopy light, visible god-ray shaft over ruins
lighting_spec.cinematography_reference: Roger Deakins — Blade Runner 2049 desert scenes (shaft of light through haze), RDR2 golden hour jungle

directional_light.notes: CAP floor: pitch MUST be <= -45 for daytime. Intensity MUST be >= 10000 lux.

sky_atmosphere.notes: Single instance only — dedup enforced by CAP guard

sky_light.notes: Real-time capture for Lumen GI bounce accuracy

volumetric_fog.purpose: Makes god-ray light shaft visible — forward scattering (0.7) concentrates light in beam direction

hub_specific_lights.label: RuinGodRay_Hub_001
hub_specific_lights.purpose: Primary god-ray shaft — simulates sunlight piercing jungle canopy above ruin cluster

hub_specific_lights.label: RuinLight_Hub_001
hub_specific_lights.purpose: Warm amber fill — ground-level ruin atmosphere (from Agent #7, enhanced)

hub_specific_lights.label: RuinLight_Hub_002
hub_specific_lights.purpose: Warm amber fill — ground-level ruin atmosphere (from Agent #7, enhanced)

hub_specific_lights.label: RuinLight_Hub_003
hub_specific_lights.purpose: Warm amber fill — ground-level ruin atmosphere (from Agent #7, enhanced)

freesound_candidates.name: Taiwan Chiayi Alishan Forest Birds Dawn Ambience
freesound_candidates.use_case: Daytime jungle ambience loop — birds + forest atmosphere

freesound_candidates.name: Ambience Bird Conservatory Nature
freesound_candidates.use_case: Dense bird chorus — Cretaceous jungle feel, multiple species

freesound_candidates.name: Edge Forest Dawn Chorus
freesound_candidates.use_case: Atmospheric background — distant bird calls, forest depth

ambient_audio_references.notes: Hand to Agent #16 (Audio) for MetaSounds integration. Layer: (1) dense bird chorus base, (2) distant calls for depth, (3) insect drone sub-layer

performance_settings.notes: Ruin fill lights have shadow disabled for performance. Only god-ray RectLight casts volumetric shadow.

next_agent_handoff.lighting_context: Hub clearing is bright midday Cretaceous. Character materials should be tuned for warm golden-white top light (5800K). Subsurface scattering on skin will catch the god-ray nicely. Avoid dark/desaturated character designs — the scene is high-key daylight.
next_agent_handoff.lumen_note: Lumen GI is active — character materials with Subsurface Profile will receive realistic bounce light from the green foliage around the clearing.
